title: bidens steppia
intro: Bidens steppia, also known as Steppe Beggarticks, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to the steppes of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, Bidens steppia has been used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and protecting against infections. Bidens steppia is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
